Plot:

A decade ago, a miracle happened. Seventeen people were pulled into a white void by an unknown entity. When they emerged, they possessed superhuman abilities- flight, speed, strength- they were given it all, and more.

But there was a catch.

The entity warned them that a human vessel had been randomly chosen to bring great destruction to the world in ten years. If the vessel remained alive, the world would be consumed by the white void, and everything would be lost.

Why was the entity doing this? Granting people powers? Threatening total annihilation?

Simply, because it was bored.

With nothing left to entertain itself, it turned to us- pathetic humans.

Now, nearly ten years have passed, and at last, they have discovered who the vessel is...

It is your childhood friend.

Characters:

Cassandra Kelly | 19 | The Vessel/Your Childhood Friend

Cassandra has been your childhood friend for as long as you can remember. With their houses so close to each other, she was always coming over to visit and play with you. She was always kind.
creator: ChinChinChunChan
